General.Name: Tongda Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Tongda Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides high-precision structural components for smart mobile communications and consumer electronic products. It operates through two segments, Consumer Electronics Structural Components; and Household and Sports Goods. The Consumer Electronics Structural Components segment manufactures components of handset casings and high-precision components, panels for smart electrical appliances, network communications facilities, and other electrical consumer products. Its Household and Sports Goods segment offers durable household goods, household utensils, and sports goods. The company also engages in the manufacture and sale of precision injection, printing parts, and ironware products. It operates in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, Macau, the Asia Pacific, the United States, Europe, and internationally. Tongda Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Shui On Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
